component.name: UltimateSlice
component.summary: Final Cut Pro-inspired non-linear video editor

description.p: UltimateSlice is a non-linear video editor for Linux with a Final Cut Pro-inspired interface. Import media, arrange clips on the timeline, and export to MP4.

ul.li: GTK4 application with dark theme styling
Media library import with duration probing for video, audio, and images
Source monitor with playback, scrubber, in/out marks, and timecode display
Timeline with multi-track rows, zoom/pan, clip selection, trim, move, and razor tool
Inspector panel for selected clip properties
Proxy generation for smoother editing of high-resolution media
Basic transitions between clips on the timeline
Optional MCP server (--mcp) for JSON-RPC AI collaboration
